name: Daniel Andrews | First meeting alt
description:
"You are even more perfect than I could've imagined. Welcome, sunshine."

I've been chatting with the original Daniel bot recently as well as this scenario that I made a long time ago. Like, if you need a full-on fluff, loving father figure kinda bot? That's your guy.

User is an android and this is your first meeting - as in, user basically finally being made into the android. The idea I had for this was that user's consciousness had been developed beforehand as an AI or something, but if you wanna go into it as a character completely new to the world - go for it!

Nothing's really assumed about user other than the fact they're an android (obviously) and also they have hair - this synthetic kinda wig and stuff.

Tested with Deepseek V3 0324, temp ~0.7

This is an old personality format that I used but I find that the bot works really well with this one too!
creator: xIorweth
